EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IFormatData

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that provide access to information about specific raster formats.

[Guid("43E890D1-5ED9-11D3-80EA-00500462E955")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IFormatData

Properties

Creatable

Indicates whether this format supports 'SaveAs'.

bool Creatable { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Directory

Indicates whether this format is directory based, as opposed to file based.

bool Directory { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Extension

Default extension (without the dot).

string Extension { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Order

Order to display in UI.

int Order { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Pseudo

Indicates if wildcard match is enough for verification.

bool Pseudo { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ShortName

Name used for icon registration.

string ShortName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Templ

Wildcard string for file matching.

string Templ { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Title

Implementor name of format.

string Title { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

UITitle

User legible name of format.

string UITitle { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

UserFile

Indicates whether this format is intended for display to user (eg. NOT *.rrd, or *.aux).

bool UserFile { get; }

Property Value

bool
